summary: POST /events/generate-cover endpoint implemented in api-gateway. ClaudeService (Anthropic SDK) generates a 3-5 word Unsplash search query; UnsplashService (axios, 15 s timeout) fetches the first landscape photo URL. All errors map to 503. Malformed requests return 400 via global ValidationPipe. 10 unit tests pass. Zero lint errors in new code.

artifacts.description: UnsplashService — searchPhoto() with axios, 15 s timeout, typed response
EventsModule — ClaudeService + UnsplashService registered as providers
New .env.example with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY placeholders
10 unit tests — happy path, Claude 503, Unsplash 503, timeout 503, 3x validation 400, ClaudeService unit, UnsplashService unit x2

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: All 7 files created/updated in rideglory-api; backend.md handoff written; contract JSON written

qualityGates.name: tests_passed_or_accepted
qualityGates.notes: 10/10 unit tests pass (npm test). Tests cover: happy path (200), Claude SDK failure (503), Unsplash axios failure (503), Unsplash timeout (503), missing title (400), missing eventType (400), missing city (400), ClaudeService SDK error unit, UnsplashService network error unit, UnsplashService empty results unit

qualityGates.name: security_checks
qualityGates.notes: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY are in .env.example as placeholders only — no real secrets committed. Firebase auth guard applies globally to the new endpoint. No bearer token bypass added.
